zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期横盘偏多震荡
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在2319.72附近波动，日内涨幅0.65%，呈现轻微上扬态势。价格位于20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)2287.05之上，显示多头仍具一定支撑，但整体波动幅度有限，短期趋势偏向横盘整理。高低点区间2321.31/2304.85提供了关键参考。  

MACD指标为-1.6649，显示动能仍处于弱势，但缺乏信号线配合，暗示市场多空力量暂未完全明确。若价格持续维持在SMA20之上，多头有机会逐步积累力量；反之，若跌破2287支撑，则可能触发进一步调整。缺少RSI数据，需要关注后续超买或超卖信号确认。  

短期支撑位在2305附近，如跌破需警惕下行风险；阻力位在2325-2330区间，上方承压明显。投资者可关注区间突破后的走势，利用低吸高抛策略控制风险，同时设置止损以防快速回调。  

交易建议上，短线可保持偏多思路，关注价格回调至2305-2310附近的支撑吸纳多单，同时警惕连续震荡造成的虚假突破。若价格稳健突破2325阻力，可考虑适量加仓，保持资金灵活分配，控制风险。

Ethereum continues to trade with a modest bullish bias after reclaiming territory above the 20-day simple moving average near 2287.05. The current price around 2319.72 suggests buyers are maintaining short-term control, although momentum remains restrained due to repeated rejection near the 2320–2330 area. Price structure shows consolidation rather than aggressive expansion, which often precedes a stronger directional move. A sustained close above recent intraday highs could open the path toward the 2350 resistance zone.

The moving average configuration supports a cautiously constructive outlook, as ETH remains above its short-term trend baseline while holding higher intraday lows. MACD at -1.66490 still reflects lingering bearish momentum beneath the surface, but the negative reading is relatively shallow and may indicate weakening downside pressure rather than a fresh bearish impulse. RSI data is unavailable, yet current price behavior suggests neutral-to-slightly bullish conditions instead of overbought territory. Traders should monitor whether momentum indicators begin turning positive alongside increased volume.

A decisive move above 2380 would significantly improve medium-term sentiment and could trigger accelerated buying interest from momentum traders.

From a trading perspective, short-term participants may consider buying controlled pullbacks toward the 2290–2300 range while maintaining disciplined stop placement below 2250. More conservative traders could wait for confirmation through a breakout above 2325 before entering long positions. If ETH fails to maintain support above the 20-day average, downside pressure may intensify toward 2250 and potentially 2200. Position sizing remains critical because Ethereum continues to trade in a volatility-sensitive macro and crypto environment.
